label: Fairness, bias & subgroup analysis

node.label: Fairness, bias & subgroup analysis
node.definition: Fairness and subgroup analysis measure performance, treatment, representation, and error disparities across protected or operationally meaningful groups.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Fairness, bias & subgroup analysis is to connect Statistics & experimental design, Causal inference to downstream capabilities including Medical imaging & clinical decision support, Tabular predictive analytics & decision support.
examples: substrate for Medical imaging & clinical decision support
substrate for Tabular predictive analytics & decision support
limitations: Coverage is necessarily incomplete: measured proxies, policies, and test suites cannot enumerate every deployment context or adversary. Its direct dependencies include Statistics & experimental design, Causal inference.

dependencies.rationale: Fairness, bias & subgroup analysis measures, constrains, audits, or governs behavior using Statistics & experimental design.
Fairness, bias & subgroup analysis measures, constrains, audits, or governs behavior using Causal inference.
Fairness, bias & subgroup analysis measures, constrains, audits, or governs behavior using Human evaluation & preference studies.
